verdict: Crabtree & Evelyn's heritage formula combines traditional moisturizers (almond oil, shea butter) with natural occlusives for intensive hand care. Luxurious positioning justified by quality ingredients, though formulation is conventional.

_research.name: Crabtree & Evelyn Ultra-Moisturising Hand Therapy
_research.con: Primarily a hand therapy product; lacks broader body care applicability and contains common commodity ingredients.
